Title: Wish has SCP Path Traversal that allows arbitrary file read/write
Description: The SCP middleware in `charm.land/wish/v2` is vulnerable to path traversal attacks. A malicious SCP client can read arbitrary files from the server, write arbitrary files to the server, and create directories outside the configured root directory by sending crafted filenames containing `../` sequences over the SCP protocol.
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
